findings.title: Password reset limiter is registered after the reset route

reasoning: `/password/reset` is registered at line 10 before the `/password` rate limiter at line 16, so reset requests reach the route before throttling. Password hashing uses bcrypt cost 12, password and reset-token verification use constant-time library comparisons, reset tokens use CSPRNG bytes and are single-use, responses are generic, and no development bypass branch was found.
